kilauea_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY DAILY UPDATE
kilauea_notices.message: HVO Kilauea YELLOW/ADVISORY - The Halemaʻumaʻu eruption of Kīlauea is paused. Glow was visible from both vents overnight. Summit inflation has continued, and forecast window for episode 48 fountains is now between today and Saturday (May 28-30).

mauna_loa_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY MONTHLY UPDATE
mauna_loa_notices.message: HVO Haleakala GREEN/NORMAL - No activity of concern for Haleakalā.
